nasb.text: The one among the sons of Aaron who offers the blood of the peace offerings and the fat, the right thigh shall be his as his portion.

esv.text: Whoever among the sons of Aaron offers the blood of the peace offerings and the fat shall have the right thigh for a portion.

cnv.text: 亞倫的子孫中，誰獻平安祭牲的血和脂肪，右後腿就歸給他，是他的分。

ccb.text: 要把右腿归给亚伦子孙中献平安祭的血和脂肪的那位祭司。
